evals.prompt: I run a Shopify store and want to retarget visitors who viewed products but didn't buy. What's the best approach?
evals.expected_output: Retargeting strategy for ecommerce product viewers including channel selection, audience segmentation, and dynamic product ads

assertions.name: audience_segmentation
assertions.description: Recommends segmenting by behavior — cart abandoners vs product viewers vs general visitors — with different budgets per segment

assertions.name: dynamic_ads
assertions.description: Recommends dynamic product ads that auto-show the products the visitor viewed

assertions.name: multi_channel
assertions.description: Suggests multiple channels (email retargeting + display/social ads) with email as the free starting point

evals.prompt: What's the difference between retargeting on AdRoll vs just using Google Ads remarketing and Meta Ads?
evals.expected_output: Platform comparison covering when to use a dedicated retargeting platform vs native ad platform remarketing

assertions.name: adroll_advantage
assertions.description: Explains AdRoll's cross-channel management (display + social + CTV in one platform) and ecommerce integrations

assertions.name: native_advantage
assertions.description: Explains that Google/Meta direct is simpler for teams already on those platforms and avoids extra vendor costs

assertions.name: recommendation_framework
assertions.description: Provides decision criteria based on budget, business type, or existing ad stack

evals.prompt: Our retargeting ROAS was 8x last quarter but has dropped to 3x. What's going wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis of declining retargeting performance with creative fatigue, audience saturation, and incrementality as key factors

assertions.name: creative_fatigue
assertions.description: Identifies creative fatigue as a common cause and recommends rotating creative every 2-3 weeks

assertions.name: audience_saturation
assertions.description: Explains that initial high ROAS comes from easy wins and subsequent drops reflect lower-intent users remaining in the pool

assertions.name: frequency_check
assertions.description: Recommends checking frequency caps and suppressing non-converters after a threshold
